user_input: Liste die Nachbarn von Bus 5 in Powerfactory zusammen mit ihrer Basisdaten-Spannung auf.

decision_trace.planner_reasoning: The request asks for neighbors of Bus 5 in PowerFactory along with their base voltage data. The topology query (pf.topology_query) identifies neighbors, and reading object attributes (pf.read_pf_object_attributes) retrieves voltage data. Both steps are required to fulfill the request.
